rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER KIRKLEY VS. DRAGAN PODLESNIK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 472
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 11, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT DRAGAN PODLESNIK's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 472 DENIED. Defendant failed to meet his burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL TRADELIUS VS. RYAN HESS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 11, 2014, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT PAUL TRADELIUS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the 1st cause of action. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts re: CC 1950.5(f)(3). Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 2nd cause of action for cross-complainant to allege facts re: use of force, willful threats, or menacing conduct. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 3rd cause of action for cross-complainant to allege facts showing that cross-complaint was locked out from the premises. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 4th causes of action to allege facts re: fraud, intimidation or coercion. Demurrer is overruled as to the 5th cause of action. complaint sufficiently alleges facts re: endeavor to recover possession. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: TURK STREET APARTMENT GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA VS. CATHERINE ROUDANI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 11, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT CATHERINE ROUDANI's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Hearing Required. Defendant to present evidence from doctor re: dates of hospitalization. Defendant shall be prepared to post $1,722 with the Court by 4 p.m. on March 11, 2014. = (501/LKS)
